ksa_text: Knowledge of AI conformity assessment and compliance lifecycle management, including conformity assessment procedures, CE marking requirements, notified body engagement, post-market surveillance obligations, and AI value chain liability triggers.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) supply chain security and risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

onet.top_element_label: Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of information technology (IT) supply chain security and risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.
Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-013 (AG, Knowledge) maps to Survey Researcher scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5265 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.526, nist_ai_rmf=0.465, dcwf=0.415. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA AG-K-013 with composite 0.5265 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5265 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the AG domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. AG domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5265 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AG-domain KSA AG-K-013 (composite 0.5265) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AG domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Composite 0.5265 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AG domain KSA at composite 0.5265 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5265, domain AG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
